rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual/methodological antecedent: both are theoretical entrant–incumbent game models about innovation choice (innovation vs. imitation/quality choice) under competitive interaction, and the citing note explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior make-or-buy/licensing theory with entrant innovation choice. This makes the citation plausibly a theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention. With an exact DOI match in the reference list, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
